risk_title: Conflict-related disruption to project implementation in Tigray region
risk_summary: The Tigray conflict has disrupted project implementation including procurement activities and infrastructure rehabilitation. The Bank has insufficient information on damage extent and overall impact. Emergency procedures were triggered to provide flexibility for response.
evidence_quote: the mission noted that the conflict in Tigray Region has disrupted the implementation of the project including the planned procurement activities. The mission noted that the GoE requested the Bank for quick support and immediate resumption of the project implementation in the region. However, at present the Bank's team has insufficient information on the extent of the damage and the overall impact of the conflict on the project implementation.

risk_title: Security challenges affecting safeguards compliance in Dire Dawa
risk_summary: Security challenges and COVID-19 impacts have complicated resolution of outstanding resettlement issues for 11 Project Affected Persons in Dire Dawa, preventing full compliance with OP/BP 4.12 on resettlement.
evidence_quote: Security challenges and COVID-19 impacts have further complicated attempts to fully resolve the outstanding issues as previously planned.

risk_title: Governance tensions affecting resettlement implementation in Dire Dawa
risk_summary: Tensions between government entities and development actors regarding land replacement for displaced persons. Host community claims over land compensation and city government decisions to change replacement locations have created implementation delays.
evidence_quote: the location of the replaced land was in the periphery of the city and there was a claim coming from the host community on use of their land without enough compensation. To ease the situation and the tension within the host community, the city government has decided to change the replacement location.

risk_title: Fragility in regional governance affecting procurement implementation in Oromia
risk_summary: Absence of dedicated procurement specialists at Oromia regional level has caused procurement delays exceeding one year. Weak regional governance capacity is impeding project implementation across six cities in the region.
evidence_quote: The project is implemented by 6 cities in the region and the cities together with the region are responsible for the selection of consulting firms and procurement of small value goods. However, the procurement processes are delayed for more than a year which is mainly due to absence of procurement specialists dedicated to the project. This situation has negatively affected the procurement as well as the project implementation in the region.

risk_title: Institutional fragility in Tigray region affecting financial management readiness
risk_summary: Financial management readiness concerns in Tigray region require situation assessment including assurances on bank accounts, staffing, and governance before re-engagement. Conflict has disrupted institutional capacity.
evidence_quote: the Bank expects the following measures to be taken to re-engage in the region: (a) conducting situation assessment (checklist developed & shared) including assurances of the Bank accounts for projects at regional and woreda levels; adequate staffing ; and other aspects of governance
